author: lOrm
content:
VERIFIED-DUP-OF-FIXED (closed via #354 + #790). Forensic grep on main @3a19163f:

```
$ grep -n 'LANGUAGES\|known_languages\|extension_to_language' src/rules.rs
12:/// Both [`extension_to_language`] and [`known_languages`] are derived from
15:pub(crate) const LANGUAGES: &[(&str, &[&str])] = &[
59:/// File extension to language name mapping (derived from [`LANGUAGES`]).
63:fn extension_to_language(ext: &str) -> Option<&'static str> {
64:    for (lang, exts) in LANGUAGES {
180:        // single LANGUAGES table so both directions stay in sync.
181:        for (lang, _) in LANGUAGES {

$ grep -n 'has_source_extension\|has_file_extension' src/auto_learn.rs
457:fn has_source_extension(word: &str) -> bool {
466:/// Crosslink #790: identical to [`has_source_extension`] now that the
470:fn has_file_extension(word: &str) -> bool {
471:    has_source_extension(word)
```

`LANGUAGES` is now the single source of truth; `extension_to_language` iterates it, `known_languages` derives from it (line 181), and `auto_learn.rs` was deduplicated under #790 (`has_file_extension` delegates to `has_source_extension`). Tests at rules.rs:338-351 pin the round-trip. Closing as duplicate of #354/#790.
